message.content: @startuml participant "PlannerNode" as PN1 #E6E6FA#00008B { } PN1 ->> PN2 : 1 cb_trajectory(msg: Trajectory) activate PN2 note right of PN2 Trajectory: - header: Header -- stamp: Time --- sec: int32 ---- nanosec: uint32 ... frame_id: string points[]: PoseStamped pose: Pose position: Point x,y,z: float64 orientation: Quaternion w,x,y,z: float64 velocities[], accelerations[]: Twist linear/angular: Vector x/y/z: double time_from_start: Duration duration_sec/duration_nsec: int32 end note deactivate PN2 return to sender via self-loop arrow labeled 'on_update_trajectory' from within activation bar back onto itself indicating internal processing step before returning control flow upward again towards original caller node represented by second instance at bottom part which mirrors first one but without any further actions taken upon receipt since task already completed successfully during previous interaction cycle involving both entities working together collaboratively
